subject: Create cmd/gemini-slave directory scaffold
description:
Create the directory structure for the gemini-slave Go implementation:

```
cmd/gemini-slave/
├── main.go              # Entry point, CLI parsing
├── protocol.go          # Protocol loading and model mapping
├── executor.go          # Gemini CLI execution
├── input.go             # Stdin/file input handling
├── main_test.go         # Integration tests
└── testdata/            # Test fixtures
    ├── small_input.go   # 1KB Go file
    └── large_input.go   # 50KB Go file (generated)
```

Use existing cmd/gogent-scout as reference for patterns.
